headline: Amazon’s Rivr Deal And AI Phone Plans Shape Long Term Outlook
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS: AMZN) has acquired Zurich based robotics startup Rivr, which focuses on autonomous stair climbing delivery robots, to accelerate doorstep delivery automation. The company is also developing an AI integrated smartphone, reportedly codenamed "Transformer", with deep links to Alexa and Prime services. Amazon.com, trading at $205.37, operates at the center of e commerce and cloud infrastructure, and these moves relate directly to its logistics and consumer technology...
